song.title: My Glorious Victor Prince Divine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) My glorious Victor, Prince Divine, Clasp these surrendered hands in Thine; At length my will is all Thine own, Glad vassal of a Savior’s throne.
[V2] 2) My Master, lead me to Thy door; Pierce this now willing ear once more; Thy bonds are freedom; let me stay With Thee, to toil, endure, obey.
[V3] 3) Yes, ear and hand, and thought and will, Use all in Thy dear slav’ry still! Self’s weary liberties I cast Beneath Thy feet; there keep them fast.
[V4] 4) Tread them still down; and then I know, These hands shall with Thy gifts o’erflow; And pierced ears shall hear the tone Which tells me Thou and I are one
song.author: Handley C. G. Moule
